note: STREAMING computed view (ENC-571) — no live subscriptions. The mirrored amplitude envelope is synthesized deterministically in records.gen.mjs and streamed column-by-column into buffer 500 (pos2_color4, triGradient@1) over a ~20s records.json timeline so the filled band grows left→right; there is no capture/embassy path and no static uploads. This stub exists only to satisfy the per-view directory contract.
